extension.description: Monitors Kodi logs, classifies issues with a cheap LLM, attempts auto-fixes via OpenRouter tool-use agent, surfaces results via Telegram bot. V1 personal use on Android TV.
extension.news: 0.4.3: setup code now shows on line 1 of the pairing dialog (was clipped below the URL in the non-scrolling dialog). 0.4.2: relay URL pre-filled by default - no manual paste needed for phone setup. 0.4.1: fixed bot not starting after phone setup on fresh installs (cross-process secrets cache); worker idempotent re-submit; non-billable OpenRouter key validation; request size guard. 0.4.0: set up from your phone - press "Set up via phone", your TV shows a short code, you open a web page (your own Cloudflare Worker), fill in the bot token + OpenRouter key + mode, and tap Send. No more typing long tokens on the TV remote. A "Manual setup" fallback (type the token on the TV) is kept. Telegram tab is now d-pad friendly (focusable buttons, no dead zones). See cloudflare/DEPLOY.md to deploy your one-time relay. 0.3.2: fixed Settings setup instructions - phone-typing (Kore/Yatse) tips were hidden by Kodi collapsing consecutive separators; removed glyphs that showed as boxes; clearer step layout. 0.3.1: critical security + correctness fixes from review (token redaction in logs, migration safety, sk-or- prefix enforcement, settings.xml readonly fix, delete-message failure handling). 0.3.0: complete UX rewrite — setup now lives inline in Settings, no more popup windows. Telegram bot guides you through OpenRouter key + mode selection via DM. No more local HTTP server, HTTPS, or browser-compat issues. 0.2.1: security/correctness fixes from review (dead should_die wired up, audit log redaction on validation errors, focus + control-ID fixes, thread lifecycle hardening, setup_secret stability). 0.2.0: phone-driven setup. TV shows a QR code + live progress indicator; phone scans, opens a local web page, does all input. Old TV-keyboard wizard kept as "Manual setup" fallback. Backed by a token-gated local HTTP server with strict CSP, host-header guard, and bad-token self-shutdown. 0.1.6: wizard heavily condensed — each step is one screen + one input. Was ~13 OK-to-continue dialogs, now ~7. Less reading, faster setup. 0.1.5: replaced wizard's example bot-token string with a clearly-fake placeholder; GitHub secret scanner was flagging the realistic-looking example as a possible leak. 0.1.4: first-launch toast is passive (no auto-opening the wizard mid-playback); settings page still has the shortcuts. 0.1.3: wizard auto-launches on first Kodi boot until configured; settings page now has Run Setup Wizard + Open Status Panel buttons up top. 0.1.2: beginner-friendly Telegram + OpenRouter onboarding (multi-screen, step-by-step, branches for first-timers). 0.1.1: branded icon + fanart; polished setup wizard + status panel. 0.1.0: initial V1 release.
